title: Database corruption following unlucky application crash in WAL mode with "PRAGMA journal_size_limit"
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, value DOUBLE DEFAULT 0.0, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (name, value) VALUES ('test2', NULL);
UPDATE test_table SET value = value + 10 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC;
key_bug_features: Database corruption after application crash in WAL mode
